Node.help: This object exposes global configuration properties and methods for Datastore operations.

Struct.name: ArchiveTimeOfDay
Struct.help: Time of the day when automated archiving is attempted.

Member.name: hour
Member.help: Hour of the day for automated archiving, using 24hr clock (13 means 1PM).

Member.name: minute
Member.help: Minute of the day for automated archiving.

Method2.name: ArchiveTestResults
Method2.help: This command archives data for the specified TestResults.

Argument.name: idList
Argument.help: List of Ids of TestResult to archive.

Method2.name: ArchiveTestResult
Method2.help: This command archives data for the specified TestResult.

Argument.name: testResultId
Argument.help: Id of the TestResult to archive.

Method2.name: GetArchiveTimeOfDay
Method2.help: Gets the configured time of the day for automated archiving.

Argument.name: timeOfDay
Argument.help: Configured time of the day for automated archiving.

Method2.name: SetArchiveTimeOfDay
Method2.help: Configures time of the day for automated archiving.

Argument.name: timeOfDay
Argument.help: Time of the day for automated archiving, using ArchiveTimeOfDay struct.

Method2.name: GetMaxSize
Method2.help: Gets configured maximum database size. When database size goes over this limit automated archiving kicks in.

Method2.name: SetMaxSize
Method2.help: Configures maximum database size. When database size goes over this limit automated archiving kicks in.

Method2.name: GetReporterDSN
Method2.help: Returns a connection string for the reporter to be used when requesting data from this Datastore.

Argument.name: reporterDsn
Argument.help: Pass this string to the reporter command line argument named -udl.
